title: Add live update support to Web UI frontend
description:
Connect the React frontend to the server's SSE endpoint so the UI updates automatically:

1. Create `useEventStream` hook using browser-native `EventSource` API
2. Export `API_BASE` from `web/src/api/client.ts` for SSE URL
3. Update `App.tsx`: replace one-shot fetch with live data via SSE, maintain version state, pass to children, add connection indicator to footer
4. Update `GraphView.tsx`: accept `version` prop, re-fetch on change, smart diff to avoid viewport reset on state-only changes
5. Update `IssueDetail.tsx`: accept `version` prop, re-fetch on change

New file: `web/src/hooks/useEventStream.ts`
Modified: `client.ts`, `App.tsx`, `GraphView.tsx`, `IssueDetail.tsx`
